articles.title: Oncologist Drops Bombshell: mRNA Vaccines Trigger Cancer Relapses in Weeks
articles.summary: Dr. Angus Dalgleish documented six melanoma patients who relapsed within six weeks of COVID boosters and testified before Senate about the mRNA-cancer link. The medical establishment continues ignoring mounting evidence of vaccine-induced cancer progression.

articles.title: The $10 Billion Acid Reflux Lie: Big Pharma Pushes Deadly Drugs for Made-Up Problem
articles.summary: Research shows most acid reflux stems from low stomach acid, not excess, yet 15% of Americans take dangerous proton pump inhibitors. These acid-blockers increase mortality risk by 19% while Big Pharma profits from treating the wrong problem entirely.

articles.title: NIH Whistleblower Exposes Gates Foundation's Puppet Control Over Medical Research
articles.summary: Former NIH official reveals Bill Gates used hundreds of millions in donations to manipulate agency research priorities for Foundation benefit. Gates essentially purchased control over America's medical research agenda while taxpayers funded his private interests.

articles.title: Big Food Deploys Big Tobacco's Playbook to Hook Americans on Ultra-Processed Death
articles.summary: New study documents how ultra-processed food industry copied tobacco's production, marketing, and lobbying tactics to protect market share. The same corporate lies that killed millions with cigarettes are now driving the obesity and diabetes epidemics.

articles.title: Senator Johnson Demands Trump Recognize COVID Vaccine Injuries Medical Establishment Denies
articles.summary: Ron Johnson calls for official ICD codes for COVID vaccine injuries as medical establishment continues systematic denial. Thousands suffer in silence while doctors refuse to acknowledge or treat post-vaccine conditions.

articles.title: Medical Schools Deliberately Train Doctors to Ignore Vaccine Injuries
articles.summary: Investigation reveals pediatricians receive almost no training in recognizing vaccine harm, only vaccine promotion and parent coercion tactics. Medical education systematically blinds doctors to vaccine injuries they're supposed to identify and treat.

articles.title: Dutch COVID Inquiry Exposed as Establishment Whitewash Operation
articles.summary: Analysis reveals Holland's COVID inquiry deliberately avoids seeking truth about lockdown harms and vaccine injuries. Another government cover-up masquerading as accountability while protecting the officials who destroyed lives.

articles.title: Chlorine Dioxide: The COVID Treatment Buried Before Ivermectin
articles.summary: Investigation uncovers how chlorine dioxide, a promising early COVID treatment, was systematically suppressed even before the ivermectin censorship campaign. Medical authorities buried multiple effective treatments to protect vaccine profits and emergency use authorizations.

articles.title: Oncologist Exposes mRNA Vaccine-Cancer Link After Six Melanoma Patients Relapse
articles.summary: Dr. Angus Dalgleish testified before the U.S. Senate after observing six melanoma patients relapse within six weeks of COVID-19 boosters. His clinical observations challenge the 'safe and effective' narrative while medical establishment ignores oncologist warnings.

articles.summary: Medical education systematically excludes training on identifying vaccine injuries, instead focusing solely on vaccination promotion and parent coercion. This educational gap leaves doctors unprepared to recognize iatrogenic harm in their patients.

articles.summary: Ron Johnson calls for Trump administration to implement ICD codes for COVID-19 vaccine injuries, seeking transparency and accountability for widespread adverse events. The absence of proper diagnostic codes has systematically obscured the scale of vaccine harm.

articles.summary: Before authorities buried ivermectin, they systematically suppressed chlorine dioxide as a COVID treatment. This pattern reveals the coordinated effort to eliminate any cheap, effective alternatives that threatened emergency use authorization profits.

articles.summary: American Journal of Public Health study documents how the processed food industry uses identical production, marketing, and regulatory capture strategies as Big Tobacco. The parallels reveal a systematic approach to manufacturing addiction while avoiding liability.

articles.summary: Breakthrough aging reversal research through lysosomal restoration succeeds in blood-forming stem cells, opening new paths for cancer and blood disorder prevention. This metabolic approach to aging bypasses pharmaceutical industry's narrow focus on symptom management.

Doctors graduate unable to identify vaccine-caused harm, creating a medical blind spot that protects pharmaceutical liability while endangering children.

articles.summary: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary publicly acknowledged the agency investigated child deaths following COVID-19 vaccination after months of cover-up. The admission confirms what independent researchers documented while federal agencies maintained deadly silence on pediatric vaccine fatalities.

articles.summary: Republican Senator Ron Johnson calls for International Classification of Diseases code for COVID-19 vaccine injuries, demanding transparency and accountability. Johnson directly challenges the medical establishment's refusal to acknowledge what he calls 'gene therapy' masquerading as vaccines.

articles.summary: Canadian MP Dean Allison launches citizen-led inquiry into vaccine injuries, demanding transparency after compensation schemes reject victims with 90%+ denial rates. UK and Canadian programs exposed as inadequate cover-ups designed to minimize liability rather than help the injured.

articles.summary: Independent researchers at Mount Sinai successfully reversed aging in blood-forming stem cells by restoring lysosomal function in mice. The breakthrough opens doors to blood disorder and cancer prevention through cellular repair mechanisms ignored by mainstream geriatric medicine.
